title: The imaginary-$θ$ dependence of the SU($N$) spectrum
summary: In this talk we will report on a study of the $θ$-dependence of the string tension and of the mass gap of four-dimensional SU($N$) Yang--Mills theories. The spectrum at $N=3$ and $N=6$ was obtained on the lattice at various imaginary values of the $θ$-parameter, using Parallel Tempering on Boundary Conditions to avoid topological freezing at fine lattice spacings. The coefficient of the $\mathcal{O}(θ^2)$ term in the Taylor expansion of the spectrum around $θ=0$ could be obtained in the continuum limit for $N=3$, and on two fairly fine lattices for $N=6$.
